title: Auth Persistence
overview: Add auth persistence features: auto-persist named sessions, import cookies from real browsers, connect to running Chrome. Builds on existing state save/load, auth-vault, and BROWSE_CDP_URL infrastructure.
scopeChallenge: Deferred persistent profiles (--profile) because launchPersistentContext breaks session multiplexing. Auto-persist covers 90% of the auth use case. Selected EXPANSION to build all 4 phases in one pass.

failureModes.mitigation: Run existing auth tests after extraction. Pure refactor — same key, same algorithm, same format.

failureModes.risk: Context already closed when saving state
failureModes.mitigation: saveSessionState wraps in try/catch, logs warning, does not throw
3s per-origin timeout, skip on failure, log warning
10s async timeout, error tells agent to relay click Allow to user
Copy DB+WAL+SHM to temp, read copy, clean up
Guard in CLI: force playwright runtime, error if lightpanda set
Already handled: isRemoteBrowser flag at server.ts:337 skips browser.close()

tasks.title: Extract encryption module from auth-vault
tasks.description: Extract resolveKey, encrypt, decrypt from src/auth-vault.ts into a new shared src/encryption.ts module. Update auth-vault.ts to import from the new module. No behavior change — pure refactor.
acceptanceCriteria: src/encryption.ts exports resolveEncryptionKey, encrypt, decrypt
src/auth-vault.ts imports from encryption.ts and all existing auth tests pass
Encryption roundtrip: encrypt then decrypt returns original plaintext

tasks.title: Create session-persist module
tasks.description: Create src/session-persist.ts with saveSessionState, loadSessionState, hasPersistedState, cleanOldStates. Uses Playwright storageState format. Optional encryption via encryption.ts. 3s per-origin timeout for localStorage restore.
acceptanceCriteria: Save + load roundtrip preserves cookies and localStorage
Encrypted save + load roundtrip works with a test key
Missing/corrupted state file returns false without throwing
Unreachable origin during localStorage restore is skipped (3s timeout)

tasks.title: Add --state CLI flag
tasks.description: Add --state <path> flag to src/cli.ts, pass to server via X-Browse-State header. Server loads state into session context before first command. If --state + --session both present, --state loads first, session persistence merges on top.
acceptanceCriteria: browse --state auth.json goto https://example.com loads cookies before navigating
--state with nonexistent file produces clear error
--state + --session both work together

tasks.title: Add state clean subcommand
tasks.description: Extend state case in src/commands/meta.ts to accept clean subcommand. Calls cleanOldStates from session-persist.ts. Cleans both .browse/states/ and .browse/sessions/*/state.json. Default 7 days, --older-than N for custom.
acceptanceCriteria: browse state clean deletes state files older than 7 days from both directories
browse state clean --older-than 30 uses custom threshold
Recent state files are not deleted

tasks.title: Hook session persistence into SessionManager
tasks.description: Modify src/session-manager.ts: getOrCreate calls loadSessionState if persisted state exists (skip for default). closeSession calls saveSessionState before closing (skip for default). closeAll saves all named sessions. Server shutdown path saves all. Resolve encryption key once in server startup.
acceptanceCriteria: Named session cookies persist across close/reopen cycle
default session does NOT auto-persist
Server shutdown saves all named session state
Idle-timeout session close saves state before closing

tasks.title: Create cookie-import module
tasks.description: Create src/cookie-import.ts — reads and decrypts cookies from Chromium browsers on macOS. Browser registry for Chrome/Arc/Brave/Edge. Uses bun:sqlite for DB access, crypto for PBKDF2+AES-128-CBC. Copy-on-lock for WAL. 10s Keychain timeout. Actionable error messages.
acceptanceCriteria: findInstalledBrowsers returns correct structure for installed browsers
chromiumEpochToUnix correctly converts timestamps
Locked DB path: copies DB+WAL+SHM to temp, reads, cleans up
Keychain timeout (10s) produces actionable error message

tasks.title: Add cookie-import command handler
tasks.description: Add cookie-import to META_COMMANDS in src/server.ts. Add handler in src/commands/meta.ts: --list shows browsers, <browser> [--domain d] [--profile p] imports cookies. Add to SAFE_TO_RETRY and help text in src/cli.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: browse cookie-import --list shows installed browsers
browse cookie-import chrome --domain github.com imports cookies into session
cookie-import is safe to retry after server restart
Missing browser name shows helpful error

tasks.title: Create chrome-discover module
tasks.description: Create src/chrome-discover.ts — discovers running Chrome via DevToolsActivePort file or port probing (9222, 9229). Each probe has 2s timeout. Returns WebSocket URL or null.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns WebSocket URL when Chrome is running with remote debugging
Returns null when no Chrome is discoverable
Does not hang — each probe has a 2s timeout

tasks.title: Add --connect and --cdp CLI flags
tasks.description: Add --connect (auto-discover) and --cdp <port> flags to src/cli.ts. --connect calls discoverChrome, sets BROWSE_CDP_URL. --cdp constructs URL directly. Both force BROWSE_RUNTIME=playwright, error if lightpanda set. Add to help text.
acceptanceCriteria: browse --connect status discovers and connects to running Chrome
browse --cdp 9222 status connects to explicit port
--connect with BROWSE_RUNTIME=lightpanda produces clear error
Discovery failure produces actionable message

tasks.title: Integration tests for all features
tasks.description: Add tests in test/sessions.test.ts (session persist roundtrip, default no-persist, corrupted state, encrypted roundtrip, state clean, --state flag) and test/features.test.ts (chromiumEpochToUnix, decryptCookieValue with synthetic data, findInstalledBrowsers, discoverChrome, cookie import with synthetic SQLite DB).
acceptanceCriteria: All new session persistence tests pass
All cookie import unit tests pass with synthetic data
All chrome discovery tests pass
Full test suite (bun test) passes with no regressions
